title: Monthly Bookkeeping
metaDescription: Certified monthly bookkeeping services and QuickBooks Online management for US businesses. Get professional bank reconciliation and credit card (CC) reconciliation.
heroDescription: Stop spending your nights wrestling with spreadsheets. Our certified bookkeepers handle every transaction, bank reconciliation, and credit card (CC) reconciliation on QuickBooks Online — keeping your books 100% accurate, organized, and tax-ready.
features: Dedicated certified bookkeeper assigned to your account
targetClients: US small business owners with 50-500+ monthly transactions
Founders who need accurate books for investor reporting
Growing companies ready to outsource back-office finance
Businesses currently using spreadsheets or DIY software

process.title: Connect Your Accounts
process.description: We securely link your bank feeds and credit cards to QuickBooks Online with read-only access.

process.title: We Categorize & Reconcile
process.description: We perform daily bank reconciliation and credit card (CC) reconciliation to match every transaction.

process.title: Review Your Reports
process.description: Receive clean, GAAP-compliant monthly financial reporting and real-time dashboard access.

faqs.question: How many transactions can you handle per month?
faqs.answer: We support businesses with anywhere from 50 to 5,000+ monthly transactions. Your flat-rate plan is customized based on your volume and account complexity.

faqs.question: Which accounting software do you use?
faqs.answer: We are certified specialists in QuickBooks Online and Xero. We set up, optimize, and manage your ledgers on these platforms to ensure clean data.

faqs.question: How quickly will my books be updated?
faqs.answer: We categorize transactions weekly or daily depending on your plan, with the full monthly close completed within 5 business days after month-end.

faqs.question: Is my financial data secure?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use bank-level 256-bit encryption and follow SOC 2 compliant processes. We connect to your bank feeds using read-only access via secure integrations like Plaid.

title: AR/AP Management
metaTitle: AR/AP Management Services | Accounts Payable & Receivable | Hashbooks
metaDescription: Streamline cash flow with professional AR/AP management services. We handle client invoicing, bill payments, credit collections tracking, and vendor management.
heroDescription: Late invoices and missed bills choke your business cash flow. Our professional AR/AP management services handle your entire billing and payment cycles, ensuring client payments flow in on time and bills go out on schedule.
features: Cash flow forecasting & aging report preparation
targetClients: Service businesses with recurring client invoicing
Companies managing 20+ vendor relationships
Businesses experiencing cash flow unpredictability
Growing businesses that need to professionalize billing

process.title: Audit Your Current Flow
process.description: We review your existing invoicing, billing, and collections processes to find gaps.

process.title: Systematize & Automate
process.description: We set up structured workflows for sending invoices, tracking payments, and scheduling bills.

process.title: Monitor & Optimize
process.description: Ongoing management with aging reports and cash flow insights delivered to your dashboard.

faqs.question: Will you chase overdue invoices for us?
faqs.answer: Yes. We send professional follow-up reminders and escalation notices for overdue accounts, helping you get paid faster without awkward conversations.

faqs.question: Can you handle both AP and AR together?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Most clients benefit from having both managed together, giving you a complete picture of your cash flow timing.

faqs.question: Do you negotiate payment terms with vendors?
faqs.answer: We can help communicate preferred payment terms and ensure you're taking advantage of any early-payment discounts offered by your vendors.

title: Payroll Processing
metaTitle: US Payroll Processing Services for Small Business | Hashbooks
metaDescription: Accurate, compliant payroll processing services for growing businesses. We handle salary calculations, federal & state tax withholdings, direct deposits, and filings.
heroDescription: Payroll compliance errors trigger heavy IRS penalties. Our certified specialists ensure every paycheck is accurate, every federal/state tax is withheld correctly, and every filing deadline is met without fail.
features: Bi-weekly or monthly payroll calculation and processing
Federal, state, and local tax withholding management
New hire reporting and onboarding support
targetClients: Businesses with 1-100 employees
Companies hiring their first employees
Startups transitioning from contractors to full-time staff
Businesses currently handling payroll manually

process.title: Setup Your Payroll
process.description: We configure your payroll system with employee details, tax rates, and payment schedules.

process.title: We Run Every Cycle
process.description: Each pay period, we calculate earnings, deductions, and taxes — then process payments.

process.title: Stay Compliant
process.description: We handle all tax filings, year-end forms, and regulatory reporting automatically.

faqs.question: Which states do you process payroll for?
faqs.answer: We handle payroll across all 50 US states, managing the different state tax requirements and filing deadlines for each.

faqs.question: Can you handle contractors and employees together?
faqs.answer: Yes. We manage both W-2 employees and 1099 contractors, ensuring proper classification and year-end reporting for each.

faqs.question: What if I have a payroll emergency or late submission?
faqs.answer: We offer priority support for urgent payroll situations. Reach out and we'll do everything possible to process on time.

title: Tax Preparation Support
metaTitle: Business Tax Preparation Support & Compliance | Hashbooks
metaDescription: Year-round tax-ready bookkeeping services. We organize your financial statements and maximize deductions so you file with complete confidence.
heroDescription: Tax season shouldn't be a scramble. With books that are clean year-round, you'll walk into tax season with confidence — every deduction claimed, every form ready, and zero surprises.
features: Sales tax tracking and filing support
targetClients: Businesses that dread tax season annually
Companies that suspect they're overpaying taxes
Multi-state businesses with complex tax obligations
Business owners who want to fire-and-forget tax prep

process.title: Clean Your Books
process.description: We ensure every transaction is properly categorized for maximum deduction capture year-round.

process.title: Prepare Your Package
process.description: Before tax deadlines, we compile a complete, CPA-ready package with all supporting documents.

process.title: File With Confidence
process.description: Your CPA receives organized, accurate financials — making filing fast, accurate, and stress-free.

faqs.question: Do you actually file tax returns?
faqs.answer: We prepare all the financial data and documentation your CPA needs to file. We work directly with your CPA to ensure a smooth handoff, or we can recommend trusted CPA partners.

faqs.question: Can you help with back taxes or amended returns?
faqs.answer: Yes. If your books need cleanup for prior years, we can reconstruct accurate financial records to support amended filings.

faqs.question: How do you maximize deductions?
faqs.answer: Proper transaction categorization throughout the year is key. We flag potential deductions in real-time so nothing is missed when tax season arrives.

title: Financial Reporting
metaTitle: GAAP Financial Reporting & Custom Dashboards | Hashbooks
metaDescription: Get GAAP-compliant financial reporting monthly. Accurate balance sheets, income statements (P&L), cash flow forecasting, and custom KPI dashboards.
heroDescription: Decisions made without clear data are just guesses. We deliver monthly financial reporting packages — including Balance Sheets, P&Ls, and Cash Flow Statements — so you know exactly where your revenue and margins stand.
features: Custom KPI dashboards and metrics tracking
targetClients: Businesses seeking funding or investor meetings
CEOs and founders who want data-driven decision making
Companies with boards requiring regular financial updates
Growing businesses that need to track departmental profitability

process.title: Define Your KPIs
process.description: We work with you to identify the metrics that matter most to your business decisions.

process.title: Build Your Dashboards
process.description: We create custom reports and dashboards tailored to your specific needs and goals.

process.title: Deliver Monthly Insights
process.description: Every month, you receive clear reports with commentary highlighting trends and action items.

faqs.question: What reports will I receive each month?
faqs.answer: Standard deliverables include a Balance Sheet, Income Statement (P&L), and Cash Flow Statement. We also build custom reports based on your specific KPIs and goals.

faqs.question: Can you create reports for my investors or board?
faqs.answer: Yes. We specialize in creating polished, professional report packages designed for investor presentations and board meetings.

faqs.question: How do you deliver reports?
faqs.answer: Reports are delivered via your preferred method — email, shared dashboard, or direct integration with your accounting platform.

title: CFO Advisory Services
metaTitle: Virtual CFO Advisory Services for Growing Companies | Hashbooks
metaDescription: Get strategic financial guidance without the full-time CFO cost. Cash flow management, growth planning, margins analysis, and investor-ready reporting.
heroDescription: You don't need a six-figure CFO salary to get executive-level financial strategy. Our virtual CFO services give you the strategic insight and planning power your business needs to scale confidently.
features: Profitability analysis by product, service, or department
Monthly strategy calls with your dedicated advisor
targetClients: Scaling startups preparing for fundraising rounds
Businesses generating $500K-$10M+ in revenue
Companies that have outgrown basic bookkeeping needs
Founders who need a strategic finance partner

process.title: Assess Your Position
process.description: We perform a deep financial analysis of your current business health, margins, and growth trajectory.

process.title: Build Your Strategy
process.description: Together, we create financial models, forecasts, and plans aligned with your business goals.

process.title: Execute & Review
process.description: Monthly strategy sessions to review performance, adjust plans, and capitalize on opportunities.

faqs.question: What's the difference between bookkeeping and CFO advisory?
faqs.answer: Bookkeeping records what happened. CFO advisory tells you what it means and what to do next. It's the strategic layer on top of accurate books.

faqs.question: How often will I meet with my advisor?
faqs.answer: Most clients meet monthly for a strategy session, with ad-hoc availability for urgent financial decisions or opportunities.

faqs.question: Do I need bookkeeping services too?
faqs.answer: CFO advisory works best when built on clean, accurate books. We recommend pairing it with our monthly bookkeeping service for the best results.

title: QuickBooks Clean Up & Catch-Up
metaTitle: QuickBooks Clean Up & Catch-Up Bookkeeping Services | Hashbooks
metaDescription: Behind on your books? We specialize in QuickBooks set-up and clean up, historical transaction reconciliation, and catch-up bookkeeping for US businesses.
heroDescription: Months or years of messy books won't fix themselves. Whether you need a one-time QuickBooks set-up and clean up or comprehensive catch-up bookkeeping, our certified experts reconstruct your ledgers and get you 100% tax-ready.
features: One-time QuickBooks set-up and clean up audit
Reconciliation of historical bank & credit card statements
Historical transaction recording and error correction
Chart of accounts optimization for US tax standards
Seamless transition to ongoing monthly bookkeeping
targetClients: Businesses that are months or years behind on books
Companies that recently switched accounting software
Startups needing clean financials for their first audit
Businesses with books handled by a non-professional

process.title: Assess the Damage
process.description: We review your current state — how far behind, what's missing, and what needs fixing.

process.title: Rebuild & Reconcile
process.description: Our experts systematically work through every period, categorizing transactions and reconciling accounts.

process.title: Transition to Clean
process.description: Once caught up, we transition you to ongoing monthly bookkeeping so you never fall behind again.

faqs.question: How far behind can you catch up?
faqs.answer: We've cleaned up books that were 3+ years behind. No matter how messy the situation, we can reconstruct accurate records from bank statements and source documents.

faqs.question: How long does catch-up take?
faqs.answer: It depends on the volume and complexity. A few months of catch-up typically takes 1-2 weeks. Multiple years may take 4-8 weeks. We'll give you a clear timeline upfront.

faqs.question: Will my catch-up data be accurate enough for taxes?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We reconstruct your books to CPA-ready standards, ensuring every period is accurate and audit-ready.

title: QuickBooks Set-up & Cloud Integration
metaTitle: QuickBooks Set-up & Cloud Accounting Integration | Hashbooks
metaDescription: Professional QuickBooks set-up and cloud accounting integration. We design your chart of accounts, migrate legacy data, and sync business apps.
heroDescription: Setting up your books correctly from day one is critical for long-term scale. We handle your complete QuickBooks set-up, cloud integration, chart of accounts design, and app syncing to automate your financial workflow.
features: Custom QuickBooks set-up and account creation
Chart of accounts customization for your industry
Integration with payment processors (Stripe, PayPal, Square)
Syncing with POS systems and inventory tools
Historical data migration from spreadsheets or legacy apps
Hands-on staff training and onboarding tutorials
targetClients: Businesses still using spreadsheets for bookkeeping
Companies on desktop software wanting to move to cloud
Startups setting up their first accounting system
Businesses wanting to integrate multiple financial tools

process.title: Evaluate & Recommend
process.description: We assess your business needs and recommend the best cloud platform and app ecosystem for you.

process.title: Setup & Migrate
process.description: We configure your new system, migrate historical data, and connect all your financial tools.

process.title: Train & Launch
process.description: Your staff gets hands-on training and documentation, then we go live with ongoing support.

faqs.question: Which cloud platform is best for my business?
faqs.answer: It depends on your size, industry, and needs. QuickBooks Online is great for most US small businesses. Xero excels for service businesses. We'll help you choose the perfect fit.

faqs.question: Will I lose any data during migration?
faqs.answer: No. We perform complete data verification before, during, and after migration. Your historical records are preserved and validated.

faqs.question: Do you provide training for my staff?
faqs.answer: Yes. We provide live training sessions and written documentation so your staff can confidently use the new system day-to-day.
